title: Guild Craft
description: A modpack for playing with ur friends!
body:
![A modpack design to play with your friends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/607f0f1e7bcfcc9737d066fdedbd71617eda1f35.png)
A modpack designed to play with your friends
___
A multiplayer-focused modpack built around the idea of playing together. It offers an RPG-inspired experience that rewards exploration, combat mastery, and cooperation, while keeping things simple and accessible through carefully chosen quality-of-life mods.
Explore a world filled with structures and dungeons, choose a combat class to define your role in a party, build and decorate your guild’s land, and enjoy immersive visuals, sounds, and progression — all without overwhelming complexity.
___ ## **
Features
** - **🏔 World** A refreshed vanilla world with improved biomes and RPG-style structures that encourage exploration. - **⚔️ Combat & Classes** Choose from **five combat classes** — **Warrior, Rogue, Healer, Paladin, and Mage** — designed to promote party-based gameplay and teamwork. - **💀 Dungeons & Bosses 💀** Take on **200+ dungeons** and **4 epic bosses**, each offering unique challenges and rewards. - **💰 Bounties** Pick up dynamic bounties from village bounty boards or hunting bounty boards to earn rewards through exploration and combat. - **📄 Quality of Life** Over **20 QoL mods** improve inventory management, UI clarity, tooltips, and general gameplay comfort. - **🌾 Farming & Crafting** Expanded farming, brewing, cooking, and decoration using the **“Let’s Do”** mod series — including vinery, brewing, baking, and more. - **🎨 Graphics & Atmosphere** Enhanced visuals through shaders, particles, animations, and mob variants for a richer and more immersive experience. - **🛻 Transport** Travel using ships across oceans , airships across the skies or sleds when winter hits, making long-distance travel more immersive and thematic. - **💬 Social Features** Improved chat with emojis, item sharing, better chat history, and multiplayer-friendly features. - **🔧 Optimization** Performance-focused mods ensure smooth gameplay even in multiplayer environments. - **🔊 Sound Design** A complete sound overhaul adds depth, realism, and immersion to every biome and encounter. - **💵 Economy & Trading** A unique currency system enables meaningful trading between players and villagers, as well as secure player-to-player exchanges. ___ ## **
GUILDS
** Guilds are a **core pillar** of the modpack and are built using a combination of four interconnected mods: - **📜 Heracles – Quests** Provides structured questlines and objectives that guide guild progression and exploration. - **🤝 Argonauts – Guilds & Allies** Manages guild members, allies, and cooperative play between players. - **🏰 Thebes – Land Claims** Allows guilds to **claim territory**, protect their land, and establish a shared base or settlement. - **👑 Prometheus – Roles & Permissions** Handles **guild roles**, ranks, and permissions, enabling organized leadership and responsibility distribution. Together, these systems create a fully-fledged **guild experience** where players can build communities, share progression, and shape the world together. ___
Shaders - Complementary – Reimagined
Resource Packs - Enhanced Boss Bars - Default Dark Mode - Eclectic Trove (Legendary Tooltips) - Medieval Music
